title: Marketplace Manager - Blue Dart Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Blue Dart Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Marketplace Manager looking for your next big career move? Blue Dart Digital Technologies in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Blue Dart Digital Technologies:
Blue Dart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
